ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Creating Lights（创建灯光）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: RenderMan lights show aim or other manipulators when you hit the 't' key in Maya.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在 Maya 中按下 't' 键时，RenderMan lights 会显示 aim 或其他 manipulators。
Analytic Light Types（解析灯光类型）
PxrRectLight
PxrCylinderLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – This is the commonly used cylinder area light used to mimic fluorescent lights and light sabers
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – 这是常用的圆柱形 area light，用于模拟 fluorescent lights 和 light sabers
PxrDiskLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – The disk is great for using as an area light or in combination with filters to make a spotlight
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – disk 很适合作为 area light 使用，也可以与 filters 结合来制作 spotlight
PxrDistantLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – The distant light is perfect for use as a sun or other distant source where light rays are nearly parallel and cover the whole scene
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – distant light 非常适合作为 sun 或其他 distant source 使用，此时 light rays 近乎平行并覆盖整个 scene
PxrSphereLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – This is a utility light for
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – 这是一个 utility light，用于
PxrDomeLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – The dome light acts as the
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – dome light 充当 scene 的
environment light（环境光）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: for a scene, and is mapped with a high dymanic range image (HDRI), very common workflow
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ，并映射 high dynamic range image（HDRI）；这是非常常见的 workflow
PxrPortalLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – For difficult lighting situations, like indirectly lit interiors, this light along with the PxrDomeLight can be used to increase the quality and speed of your renders. Portal lights need to be associated with a dome light.  First select a PxrDomeLight and then create a PxrPortalLight from the RenderMan shelf or create from the Domelight under Portals
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – 对于间接照明室内等困难 lighting situations，此 light 可与 PxrDomeLight 一起使用，提高 renders 的 quality 和 speed。Portal lights 需要与一个 dome light 关联。先选择一个 PxrDomeLight，然后从 RenderMan shelf 创建 PxrPortalLight，或从 Portals 下的 Domelight 创建
PxrEnvDayLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: – This is a daylight simulation shader where you can supply any time and location on Earth or simply place your sunlight where you like it, use the 't' manipulator to adjust the sun location manually
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: – 这是一个 daylight simulation shader（日光模拟 shader），你可以提供地球上任意 time 和 location，或者直接把 sunlight 放在想要的位置；使用 't' manipulator 可手动调整 sun location
